product_overview: LocalSearchEngine is a hyperlocal discovery and commerce platform that lets customers find nearby shops and products, converse with shop owners, receive quotes, and place orders; shop owners can register, list products, and view dashboard metrics.
core_goals: Enable fast, location-aware discovery of shops and products
Provide real-time customer ↔ shop interaction and negotiation (quotes)
Support OTP-based authentication and JWT sessions for role-based access
Enable simple order lifecycle from quote acceptance to completion
Deliver a personalized home feed using search, orders, and interactions

features.name: Auth Service
features.description: OTP-based identity and session management that issues JWTs for authenticated API access and supports role assignment (customer, shop_owner, driver, admin).
user_flows: POST /auth/send-otp with {phone} -> Receive 200 OTP sent confirmation -> POST /auth/verify-otp with {phone, otp} -> Receive 200 with {accessToken: 'JWT'} (happy path)
POST /auth/send-otp with invalid phone -> Receive 400 invalid phone format -> POST /auth/verify-otp with {phone, wrongOtp} -> Receive 401 invalid OTP (error path)

features.name: Shop Service
features.description: Shop registration and public shop retrieval plus an authenticated shop owner dashboard for metrics.
user_flows: POST /auth/send-otp with {ownerPhone} -> Receive 200 OTP sent -> POST /auth/verify-otp with {ownerPhone, otp} -> Receive 200 with {accessToken: 'ownerJWT'} -> POST /shops with Authorization: Bearer ownerJWT and {name, location, category} -> Receive 201 with {shopId} -> GET /shops/:id (replace :id with shopId) without auth -> Receive 200 shop details -> GET /shops/dashboard with Authorization: Bearer ownerJWT -> Receive 200 dashboard metrics (happy path)

POST /shops without Authorization header -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> GET /shops/:id with nonexistent id -> Receive 404 not found -> GET /shops/dashboard with Authorization: Bearer <JWT-of-non-owner> -> Receive 403 forbidden (error path)

features.name: Product Service
features.description: Add and manage products tied to a shop; protected endpoints require an authenticated shop owner.
user_flows: POST /auth/send-otp with {ownerPhone} -> Receive 200 OTP sent -> POST /auth/verify-otp with {ownerPhone, otp} -> Receive 200 with {accessToken: 'ownerJWT'} -> POST /products with Authorization: Bearer ownerJWT and {shop_id, name, price, stock, category} -> Receive 201 with {productId} (happy path)

POST /products with Authorization: Bearer ownerJWT and missing required fields (no price) -> Receive 400 validation error -> POST /products with Authorization: Bearer <JWT-of-non-owner> and valid body -> Receive 403 forbidden (error path)

features.name: Search Service
features.description: Location-aware shop discovery by keyword with fallback behavior when backend problems occur.
user_flows: GET /search/shops?q=bakery&lat=12.9716&lon=77.5946 -> Receive 200 list of shops with fields {shopId, name, deliveryTag} ordered by relevance and distance (happy path)

GET /search/shops?q=bakery without lat/lon -> Receive 400 missing location parameters -> GET /search/shops?q=bakery&lat=12.9716&lon=77.5946 when search backend returns 500 -> Receive 500 search error -> GET /search/shops?q=bakery&useCache=true -> Receive 200 cached/fallback results (error/fallback path)

features.name: Chat & Quote Service
features.description: Conversation creation between customer and shop, shop-owner quote creation, and customer acceptance which triggers order creation.
user_flows: POST /auth/send-otp with {custPhone} -> Receive 200 OTP sent -> POST /auth/verify-otp with {custPhone, otp} -> Receive 200 with {accessToken: 'custJWT'} -> POST /chat/conversations with Authorization: Bearer custJWT and {shop_id} -> Receive 200 with {conversationId} -> POST /auth/send-otp with {ownerPhone} -> Receive 200 OTP sent -> POST /auth/verify-otp with {ownerPhone, otp} -> Receive 200 with {accessToken: 'ownerJWT'} -> POST /chat/quotes with Authorization: Bearer ownerJWT and {conversationId, items, total} -> Receive 201 with {quoteId} -> POST /chat/quotes/:quoteId/accept with Authorization: Bearer custJWT -> Receive 201 with {orderId} (happy path)

POST /chat/conversations with Authorization: Bearer <invalid-token> and {shop_id} -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> POST /chat/quotes with Authorization: Bearer custJWT and {conversationId, items} -> Receive 403 forbidden (customer cannot create quote) -> POST /chat/quotes/:nonexistentQuoteId/accept with Authorization: Bearer custJWT -> Receive 404 not found (error path)

features.name: Order Service
features.description: Order retrieval and dev-mode manual completion endpoint for testing order lifecycle transitions.
user_flows: POST /auth/verify-otp with {custPhone, otp} -> Receive 200 with custJWT -> POST /chat/quotes/:quoteId/accept with Authorization: Bearer custJWT -> Receive 201 with {orderId} -> GET /orders/:orderId with Authorization: Bearer custJWT -> Receive 200 with order details and status -> POST /orders/:orderId/complete with Authorization: Bearer custJWT -> Receive 200 order status updated to COMPLETED (dev/test happy path)

GET /orders/:orderId with Authorization: Bearer <other-user-jwt> -> Receive 403 forbidden -> POST /orders/:orderId/complete without dev/test flag or without proper authorization -> Receive 403 forbidden (error path)

features.name: Home Service
features.description: Personalized home feed combining favorites, regular shops, recommended shops, and categories for authenticated users.
user_flows: POST /auth/verify-otp with {phone, otp} -> Receive 200 with {accessToken: 'JWT'} -> GET /home with Authorization: Bearer JWT -> Receive 200 with {favorites: [], regularShops: [], recommended: [], categories: []} (happy path)

GET /home with malformed or expired Authorization header -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> GET /home with valid JWT when personalization DB is unavailable -> Receive 500 personalization error -> GET /home?fallback=generic with valid JWT -> Receive 200 generic feed (error/fallback path)

features.name: Auth Service
features.description: Identity and session management using OTP and JWT

endpoints.description: Generate and send OTP to phone
Verify OTP and return access token
Add a new product to a shop
Search for nearby shops by keyword
Create/get conversation between customer and shop
Shop owner creates a quote for a conversation
Customer accepts a quote and creates an order
